name: OpenCode Agent Harness
description: Registers the native OpenCode agent harness.

server.label: OpenCode Server
server.help: Connection settings for the OpenCode native runtime.

server.mode.label: Startup Mode
server.mode.help: Use managed to launch opencode serve inside the gateway process, or remote to connect to an existing server.

server.baseUrl.label: Base URL
server.baseUrl.help: Base URL for a remote opencode serve instance, for example http://127.0.0.1:4096.

server.hostname.label: Hostname
server.hostname.help: Managed-mode listen hostname for opencode serve. Defaults to 127.0.0.1.

server.port.label: Port
server.port.help: Managed-mode listen port for opencode serve. Defaults to 4096.

server.minVersion.label: Minimum Version
server.minVersion.help: Optional minimum tested OpenCode server version.
